name: Mythical Beast Jackal King
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔導獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>マジックビースト</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> キングジャッカル
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
If you have no card in your other Pendulum Zone: You can destroy this card, and if you do, Special Summon 1 face-up "Mythical Beast" Pendulum Monster from your Extra Deck, except "Mythical Beast Jackal King". You can only use this effect of "Mythical Beast Jackal King" once per turn.

[ Monster Effect ] 
Each time a Spell Card is activated, place 2 Spell Counters on this card when that Spell resolves. Once per turn, when an opponent activates a monster effect (Quick Effect): You can remove 2 Spell Counters from your field; negate the activation, and if you do, destroy that card.
pend_eff: If you have no card in your other Pendulum Zone: You can destroy this card, and if you do, Special Summon 1 face-up "Mythical Beast" Pendulum Monster from your Extra Deck, except "Mythical Beast Jackal King". You can only use this effect of "Mythical Beast Jackal King" once per turn.
mnst_eff: Each time a Spell Card is activated, place 2 Spell Counters on this card when that Spell resolves. Once per turn, when an opponent activates a monster effect (Quick Effect): You can remove 2 Spell Counters from your field; negate the activation, and if you do, destroy that card.
eff: Each time a Spell Card is activated, place 2 Spell Counters on this card when that Spell resolves. Once per turn, when an opponent activates a monster effect (Quick Effect): You can remove 2 Spell Counters from your field; negate the activation, and if you do, destroy that card.

action: Activates if other Pendulum Zone is unoccupied
mst: Negates the activation of your opponent's Effect Monster's effect
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
